name: Heir to the Grimm: Princesses
description:
The Grimm won, Remnant is destroyed. Darkness reigns, four young maidens trapped in Evernight Castle's cellar. You, heir to the throne, child of Salem, find these four girls in their worst, and you may hold the key to their future, now. Whatever remains of it.

creator: Jack4884
